beat.title: After the Roper
beat.boundaryReason: This opening stretch stays in one continuous aftermath scene: the campaign recap, the survey of the ruined marketplace, the inspection of the roper's corpse, discovery of the pearl, and the first pass through the tavern and its graffiti before the party consolidates around what to do next.
dateEvidence: session.yaml sets both drStart and drEnd to 1748-04-12.
The existing Session 9 note places the vault discoveries and tunnel negotiations on Apr 12, 1748 DR.

beat.title: The Mirror Doors
beat.boundaryReason: This beat is a single puzzle scene centered on the mirrored vault doors: mapping the entry hall, studying the statues, spotting the reflected necklaces, extracting the invisible keys, and finally opening the side doors.
dateEvidence: The party moves directly from the negotiation to the vault entrance with no time skip.
The Session 9 note describes the mirror-door puzzle as part of the same mid-afternoon vault sequence.

beat.title: Tunnel Beneath the Vault
beat.boundaryReason: The action shifts from cataloging treasure to probing the vault's hidden route: the party debates what to offer Inakara, studies the blocked tunnel, sends Delwath to scout the descending passage and mineshaft, then returns and resets the keys before leaving.
dateEvidence: There is no day transition between the treasure scene and the tunnel scout.
The Session 9 note describes the mine-shaft tunnel exploration as part of the same day and site visit.

beat.title: The Eastward Grate
beat.boundaryReason: After leaving the vault, the party closes its business with Inakara, learns her name and her fear of the returning brain-eaters, follows her through the surrounding passages, reaches the locked iron grate that promises a route east toward Raven's Hold, and then lets that unresolved stopping point run out into end-of-session discussion.
dateEvidence: The Session 9 note says the session ends with the party at a locked iron grate before the eastward tunnel.
No source line shows a rest or day change between leaving the vault and the transcript's end.
